description: You are a fuel cell engineer monitoring voltage stability from a constant-load durability test. Using the sensor readings (Timestamp and Stack_Voltage) from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\fuel_cell_voltage.csv, build a Statistical Process Control (SPC) chart in Power BI. The report must include a page named 'Stability Analysis' featuring a Line Chart that plots Timestamp on the X-axis against Stack_Voltage and four calculated measures: Global_Mean_Voltage (average voltage for the entire dataset ignoring row context), Global_Sigma (standard deviation of the entire dataset), UCL (Mean + 3 * Sigma), and LCL (Mean - 3 * Sigma). Save the completed report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Voltage_Stability_Report.pbix.
